case_title: CINDY DELA CRUZ RAZO et al VS. FLAVIANA R. MENDOZA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY RAZO, CINDY DELA CRUZ UMAGAT, CHRISTOPHER LLOYD AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, FLAVIANA R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE.
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-21-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2008 - JUDGMENT. THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH CCP 1950.5 WITH RESPECT TO SECURITY DEPOSITS AND THAT STATUTORY DAMAGES OF $4000 (INCLUDED IN THE AWARD) ARE WARRANTED AS PROVIDED FOR IN CCP 1950 (E). JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER; CLERK;S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAZO, CINDY DELA CRUZ UMAGAT, CHRISTOPHER LLOYD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, FLAVIANA R. $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,075.00, THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH CCP 1950.5 WITH RESPECT TO SECURITY DEPOSIT, AND THAT STATUTORY DAMAGES OF $4000 (INCLUDED IN THE AWARD) ARE WARRANTED AS PROVIDED FOR IN CCP 1950.5 (E) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAZO, CINDY DELA CRUZ UMAGAT, CHRISTOPHER LLOYD AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, FLAVIANA R.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $3,035.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $53.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, FLAVIANA R.
